channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: England are level 0-0 with …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: England are level 0-0 with reigning champions Argentina in the opening half of their 2026 World Cup semifinal.

It has been a fractious half, and there have already been 19 fouls, with tempers frequently flaring in an ugly encounter. nyti.ms/4w89fkH
item.content:encoded:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: England are level 0-0 with reigning champions Argentina in the opening half of their 2026 World Cup semifinal.

It has been a fractious half, and there have already been 19 fouls, with tempers frequently flaring in an ugly encounter. nyti.ms/4w89fkH

item.title: 仕事帰りのオニユリを貼り付けて 今日はこのへんで 今日も いいね・リポスト・リプライありがとうございました😌 おやす…
item.author: rinpapa1133 (@rinpapa.com)
item.description:
仕事帰りのオニユリを貼り付けて 今日はこのへんで

今日も いいね・リポスト・リプライありがとうございました😌
おやすみなさい🥱

Nature's wild elegance. 🧡✨

Thank you for your continued support 😊
Wishing you a peaceful day wherever you are. 😌
#TigerLily #FlowerPhotography #NaturePhotography #MacroPhotography #Japan

item.title: ( ･ᴗ･o[こんばんは]o 6月15日の朝5:45頃投稿から１枚(:D)┓ 【飛鳥山下跨線人道橋≒王子駅】 253系…
item.author: ヂーゼル機関車《masashi》 (@dieselloco.bsky.social)
item.description:
( ･ᴗ･o[こんばんは]o
6月15日の朝5:45頃投稿から１枚(:D)┓
【飛鳥山下跨線人道橋≒王子駅】
　253系[青い日光号/団体]東武日光行。右側は、あじさいが咲く飛鳥の小径。
《数日前の朝投稿の組み写真から１枚に注目して選択！リバイバル投稿しています。》

item.title: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple …
item.author: TechCrunch (@techcrunch.com)
item.description: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.

item.title: Paramount investors sue David and Larry Ellison, claiming th…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Paramount investors sue David and Larry Ellison, claiming the two struck an illegal deal with Trump for approval of the WBD merger by promising to overhaul CNN (Winston Cho/The Hollywood Reporter)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:

item.title: こんばんは お疲れ様です 朝 出勤時に道路脇の温度計は29度 帰宅後一息ついてこの画を撮った時の気温が30度 朝から晩…
item.author: 🦀川口 掌🦀 (@kawaguchitenohira.bsky.social)
item.description:
こんばんは
お疲れ様です

朝 出勤時に道路脇の温度計は29度 帰宅後一息ついてこの画を撮った時の気温が30度 朝から晩まで暖かいが続いてますね
水分補給🥤🚰🥤🚰忘れずにね

おやすみなさい♡💤
item.content:encoded:
こんばんは
お疲れ様です

朝 出勤時に道路脇の温度計は29度 帰宅後一息ついてこの画を撮った時の気温が30度 朝から晩まで暖かいが続いてますね
水分補給🥤🚰🥤🚰忘れずにね

おやすみなさい♡💤

item.title: #青空ごはん部 #入院中病院食 【 入院生活一ヶ月記念 】 先月の十五日に緊急手術 ＆ 入院となったので、今日で入院…
item.author: 園芸の狼 (@gardeningwerewolf.bsky.social)
item.description:
#青空ごはん部
#入院中病院食

【 入院生活一ヶ月記念 】

先月の十五日に緊急手術 ＆ 入院となったので、今日で入院生活一ヶ月となります… 🫒
入院時には梅雨どきだったのに、今や毎日記録的猛暑の報道です… 🫒
入院生活も、さすがに一ヶ月となると内心忸怩たる思いではありますが、そこはグッとこらえて、お医者さんの診立てに従うしかありません … 🙇🫒
あとはもう、手術跡がきちんと治ってくれて、抗生剤の投与によって雑菌が駆除されれば退院、なのですが… 🫒

リハビリはおおむね順調であります… ( 😆)ゝ
item.content:encoded:
#青空ごはん部
#入院中病院食

【 入院生活一ヶ月記念 】

先月の十五日に緊急手術 ＆ 入院となったので、今日で入院生活一ヶ月となります… 🫒
入院時には梅雨どきだったのに、今や毎日記録的猛暑の報道です… 🫒
入院生活も、さすがに一ヶ月となると内心忸怩たる思いではありますが、そこはグッとこらえて、お医者さんの診立てに従うしかありません … 🙇🫒
あとはもう、手術跡がきちんと治ってくれて、抗生剤の投与によって雑菌が駆除されれば退院、なのですが… 🫒

リハビリはおおむね順調であります… ( 😆)ゝ

item.title: In every heart, a quiet fire burns Refusing to dim Holding …
item.author: jen 💙🤍 (@jenzsky.bsky.social)
item.description:
In every heart, a quiet fire burns
Refusing to dim
Holding on to visions of truth
Never surrenders, even when courage fades
Hope whispers softly
Begin again…

#clouds #seascape #scape #eck
#cloudscape #sky #bluetue
#blueskyartshow #quiet #sunset #imageandverse #photography
#photographersonbluesky
item.content:encoded:
In every heart, a quiet fire burns
Refusing to dim
Holding on to visions of truth
Never surrenders, even when courage fades
Hope whispers softly
Begin again…

#clouds #seascape #scape #eck
#cloudscape #sky #bluetue
#blueskyartshow #quiet #sunset #imageandverse #photography
#photographersonbluesky

item.title: ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙 今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄 本日は、個人の投稿に多くの評価をして頂き、…
item.author: ｈｉｋｏ１９８１.ｂｓｋｙ.ｓｏｃｉａｌ (@hiko1981.bsky.social)
item.description:
ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙
今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄
本日は、個人の投稿に多くの評価をして頂き、ありがとうございます😊そんな皆さんに深く感謝致します。
それと、作品が先程完成したので、明日改めて投稿させて頂きます。
７月半ばに入り、ますます厳しい暑い夏の日々が訪れてきますが、そんな暑さに負けずに体調を大事にして元気に過ごしていきましょう。
それでは、明日も良い一日を。おやすみなさい😴
item.content:encoded:
ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙
今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄
本日は、個人の投稿に多くの評価をして頂き、ありがとうございます😊そんな皆さんに深く感謝致します。
それと、作品が先程完成したので、明日改めて投稿させて頂きます。
７月半ばに入り、ますます厳しい暑い夏の日々が訪れてきますが、そんな暑さに負けずに体調を大事にして元気に過ごしていきましょう。
それでは、明日も良い一日を。おやすみなさい😴

item.title: 暑いので薄味の冷製にしました： ・豚にくと冬瓜の煮物 カレー風味 ...といってもお肉なので冷蔵庫で冷やさずに自然に…
item.author: aldila🕊️🌿🍋 (@aldila-kanata.bsky.social)
item.description:
暑いので薄味の冷製にしました：

・豚にくと冬瓜の煮物　カレー風味

...といってもお肉なので冷蔵庫で冷やさずに自然に冷ましただけ
上にセルフィーユをたっぷり🌿
#青空ごはん部 #青おらワイン部 #food #pork #wintermelon #washoku #japan

item.title: @warnock.senate.gov thinks Americans are reexamining how pol…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
@warnock.senate.gov thinks Americans are reexamining how politicians weaponize faith:

“I don’t think that people are necessarily impressed or unimpressed by your creeds. I think what matters is your deeds.”

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
@warnock.senate.gov thinks Americans are reexamining how politicians weaponize faith:

“I don’t think that people are necessarily impressed or unimpressed by your creeds. I think what matters is your deeds.”

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: These hero dogs chased off a man who tried to sexually assau…
item.author: WeRateDogs (@weratedogs.com)
item.description: These hero dogs chased off a man who tried to sexually assault two female dog walkers. They were able to push him away, and then their pack of 11 rescue dogs ran him off into a tunnel and ripped off a piece of his pants. The dogs are all getting our highest honor, a 15/10
item.content:encoded: These hero dogs chased off a man who tried to sexually assault two female dog walkers. They were able to push him away, and then their pack of 11 rescue dogs ran him off into a tunnel and ripped off a piece of his pants. The dogs are all getting our highest honor, a 15/10

item.title: NEW: Months after FCC Commissioner Olivia Trusty cast a deci…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description: NEW: Months after FCC Commissioner Olivia Trusty cast a decisive vote approving Paramount’s historic $8 billion merger with Skydance Media, she and a guest accepted Kennedy Center gala tickets from the company worth more than $12,000.
item.content:encoded: NEW: Months after FCC Commissioner Olivia Trusty cast a decisive vote approving Paramount’s historic $8 billion merger with Skydance Media, she and a guest accepted Kennedy Center gala tickets from the company worth more than $12,000.

item.title: It’s not about the burritos. This year’s spread of Cyclosp…
item.author: The Verge (@theverge.com)
item.description:
It’s not about the burritos.

This year’s spread of Cyclospora – better known as the ‘explosive diarrhea parasite’ – is a symptom of federal budget cuts and a scary vision of how America deals with a health crisis in the future.

Read more from @gabydvj.bsky.social: buff.ly/3ZYSuUK
item.content:encoded:
It’s not about the burritos.

This year’s spread of Cyclospora – better known as the ‘explosive diarrhea parasite’ – is a symptom of federal budget cuts and a scary vision of how America deals with a health crisis in the future.

Read more from @gabydvj.bsky.social: buff.ly/3ZYSuUK

item.title: The air in my hometown right now. Ontario has some of the wo…
item.author: Sheila E. Young (@sheilaeyoung1.bsky.social)
item.description: The air in my hometown right now. Ontario has some of the worst air quality in the world due to wildfire smoke. It is unnatural lighting outside at the moment. Stay inside if you can. The air is crunchy and smells like wood smoke. Take care, all.❤️🇨🇦
item.content:encoded: The air in my hometown right now. Ontario has some of the worst air quality in the world due to wildfire smoke. It is unnatural lighting outside at the moment. Stay inside if you can. The air is crunchy and smells like wood smoke. Take care, all.❤️🇨🇦

item.title: Tiramisu Valley
item.author: Rolf Oldejans (@rolfoldejans.bsky.social)
item.description: Tiramisu Valley
item.content:encoded: Tiramisu Valley

item.title: The FIFA World Cup on Sunday in New York will be won by Spai…
item.author: Paul van der Meer (@paulvandermeer.bsky.social)
item.description: The FIFA World Cup on Sunday in New York will be won by Spain. Tr*mp will be present during the ceremony. The Spanish King Felipe VI will be there as well as PM Pedro Sánchez and Tr*mp will be booed out of the stadium. I can't wait!!
item.content:encoded: The FIFA World Cup on Sunday in New York will be won by Spain. Tr*mp will be present during the ceremony. The Spanish King Felipe VI will be there as well as PM Pedro Sánchez and Tr*mp will be booed out of the stadium. I can't wait!!

item.title: A caddy pulled off a hole in one in front of golf legends. A…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: A caddy pulled off a hole in one in front of golf legends. A 1 in 12,500 shot that most pros never achieve in their entire career.
item.content:encoded: A caddy pulled off a hole in one in front of golf legends. A 1 in 12,500 shot that most pros never achieve in their entire career.
